description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 26cm Width: 30cm Depth: 10cm Blended fabric upper for durability A flap on the front with a twist button closure One zippered pocket on the front and one at the back One main compartment with a zippered pocket and a mobile pouch Two short handles Buckle design on the front Metallic brand badge appliqued on the front Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
